codeReview.summary: The feature contract is satisfied at current HEAD. The implementation updates onchain simple token price aggregate fields to prefer live DeFiLlama-backed pool aggregates whenever live token pricing succeeds, while preserving seeded fallback when live pool/provider data is unavailable. The added route-level test proves the live aggregate-field path with explicit assertions for market cap, 24h volume, and reserve outputs.

summary: Reviewed the mission metadata, worker handoff/transcript skeleton, skill instructions, feature commit ed1c60a999383863e924d6fa7e9826b61a10cd9f, and current HEAD implementation. The change is correctly isolated to `fetchLiveSimpleTokenPrice` plus route-level test coverage, and I found no blocking or non-blocking issues for this feature.
